info.description: Use this to create any new standalone page on the site. Each entry's `slug` becomes the URL. Example: slug 'mission' → page lives at /mission. Use for Privacy, Terms, Mission, Cookies, About sub-pages, or any one-off page that needs a hero + body + optional CTA. Once created, link it from the Footer's Legal Links (Footer single-type) by putting the slug with a leading slash in the Href field, e.g. '/mission'.

title.description: The big heading at the top of the page.

slug.description: URL slug. Must match the route. Examples: 'the-work', 'experiences-landing', 'mantras', 'cosmic-forecast', 'contact', 'welcome', 'about-press', 'about-partnerships', 'the-work-client-stories', 'the-work-ways-to-work-with-me'.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label above the title. e.g. 'About', 'The Work', 'Community'.

kickerColour.description: Hex colour for the kicker. Pink #F280AA, blue #7BAFDD, gold #FAA21B, mint #5DCAA5, plum #6E3A5A.

tagline.description: Italic subtitle under the main title. One sentence.

heroImage.description: Main image. Landscape orientation works best.

intro.description: Main body. Use the toolbar for headings, bold, italic, bullet/numbered lists, links, and quotes. Separate paragraphs with a BLANK LINE between them. Works for short blurbs or long multi-section pages.

ctaLabel.description: Optional button text at the bottom.

seoDescription.description: Optional SEO description for Google. Keep under 160 characters.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.
